options.content:
## 🛰️  Copilot CLI · AgentOps
Live OpenTelemetry from `copilot-observe` → OTel Collector → Application Insights → Log Analytics. Use the **model / operation / agent / repo** filters above to slice.

**Cost model:** `github.copilot.cost` reports **GitHub AI Credits** (1 credit = $0.01 USD, effective 2026-06-01). **Est. cost (USD)** is computed per call from real per-token rates ([GitHub Copilot pricing](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/concepts/billing/usage-based-billing-for-individuals)), split across **cache_read / cache_creation / uncached input / output** tiers using `gen_ai.usage.*` fields emitted by Copilot CLI 1.0.51.

azureLogAnalytics.query: AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']) | where operation == 'invoke_agent' | summarize Runs=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']) | where operation == 'execute_tool' | summarize Calls=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), itok=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']), otok=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']) | where operation == 'invoke_agent' | summarize Tokens=sum(coalesce(itok,0.0)+coalesce(otok,0.0)) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), cost=todouble(Properties['github.copilot.cost']) | where operation == 'invoke_agent' | summarize Credits=sum(coalesce(cost,0.0)) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

let pricing = datatable(model:string, in_per_m:real, cin_per_m:real, cw_per_m:real, out_per_m:real) [ 'claude-opus-4.7-1m-internal', 5.0, 0.5, 6.25, 25.0, 'claude-opus-4.7', 5.0, 0.5, 6.25, 25.0, 'claude-opus-4.6', 5.0, 0.5, 6.25, 25.0, 'claude-opus-4.5', 5.0, 0.5, 6.25, 25.0, 'claude-sonnet-4.6', 3.0, 0.3, 3.75, 15.0, 'claude-sonnet-4.5', 3.0, 0.3, 3.75, 15.0, 'claude-sonnet-4', 3.0, 0.3, 3.75, 15.0, 'claude-haiku-4.5', 1.0, 0.1, 1.25, 5.0, 'gpt-5.5', 5.0, 0.5, 5.0, 30.0, 'gpt-5.4', 2.5, 0.25, 2.5, 15.0, 'gpt-5.4-mini', 0.75, 0.075, 0.75, 4.5, 'gpt-5.4-nano', 0.2, 0.02, 0.2, 1.25, 'gpt-5.3-codex', 1.75, 0.175, 1.75, 14.0, 'gpt-5.2-codex', 1.75, 0.175, 1.75, 14.0, 'gpt-5.2', 1.75, 0.175, 1.75, 14.0, 'gpt-5-mini', 0.25, 0.025, 0.25, 2.0, 'gpt-4.1', 2.0, 0.5, 2.0, 8.0, 'gemini-2.5-pro', 1.25, 0.125, 1.25, 10.0, 'gemini-3-flash', 0.5, 0.05, 0.5, 3.0, 'gemini-3.1-pro', 2.0, 0.2, 2.0, 12.0, 'gemini-3.5-flash', 1.5, 0.15, 1.5, 9.0 ]; AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), itok=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']), otok=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']), ctok_read=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.cache_read.input_tokens']), ctok_write=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.cache_creation.input_tokens']) | where operation == 'invoke_agent' | lookup kind=leftouter pricing on model | extend uncached_in = coalesce(itok,0.0) - coalesce(ctok_read,0.0) - coalesce(ctok_write,0.0) | extend uncached_in = iff(uncached_in < 0, 0.0, uncached_in) | extend est_usd = (     uncached_in * coalesce(in_per_m, 5.0)     + coalesce(ctok_read,0.0) * coalesce(cin_per_m, 0.5)     + coalesce(ctok_write,0.0) * coalesce(cw_per_m, 6.25)     + coalesce(otok,0.0) * coalesce(out_per_m, 25.0)   ) / 1000000.0 | summarize EstUsd=sum(est_usd) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']) | where operation == 'invoke_agent' | summarize P95=percentile(DurationMs, 95) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), err=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where operation == 'invoke_agent' | summarize total=count(), ok=countif(Success == true and isempty(err)) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | extend SuccessPct=iff(total==0, real(null), ok*100.0/total) | project TimeGenerated, SuccessPct | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), err=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where operation == 'execute_tool' | summarize calls=count(), failures=countif(Success == false or isnotempty(err)) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | extend FailPct=iff(calls==0, real(null), failures*100.0/calls) | project TimeGenerated, FailPct | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash'])  | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval), operation | order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Tokens over time (cache_read / cache_write / fresh input / output)

azureLogAnalytics.query: AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), itok=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']), otok=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']), ctok_read=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.cache_read.input_tokens']), ctok_write=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.cache_creation.input_tokens']) | where operation == 'invoke_agent' | extend FreshInput=iff(coalesce(itok,0.0)-coalesce(ctok_read,0.0)-coalesce(ctok_write,0.0) < 0, 0.0, coalesce(itok,0.0)-coalesce(ctok_read,0.0)-coalesce(ctok_write,0.0)) | summarize CacheRead=sum(coalesce(ctok_read,0.0)), CacheWrite=sum(coalesce(ctok_write,0.0)), FreshInput=sum(FreshInput), Output=sum(coalesce(otok,0.0)) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']) | where operation == 'invoke_agent'  | summarize P50=percentile(DurationMs,50), P95=percentile(DurationMs,95), P99=percentile(DurationMs,99) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: AI Credits, AIU & Est. USD over time

azureLogAnalytics.query: let pricing = datatable(model:string, in_per_m:real, cin_per_m:real, cw_per_m:real, out_per_m:real) [ 'claude-opus-4.7-1m-internal', 5.0, 0.5, 6.25, 25.0, 'claude-opus-4.7', 5.0, 0.5, 6.25, 25.0, 'claude-opus-4.6', 5.0, 0.5, 6.25, 25.0, 'claude-opus-4.5', 5.0, 0.5, 6.25, 25.0, 'claude-sonnet-4.6', 3.0, 0.3, 3.75, 15.0, 'claude-sonnet-4.5', 3.0, 0.3, 3.75, 15.0, 'claude-sonnet-4', 3.0, 0.3, 3.75, 15.0, 'claude-haiku-4.5', 1.0, 0.1, 1.25, 5.0, 'gpt-5.5', 5.0, 0.5, 5.0, 30.0, 'gpt-5.4', 2.5, 0.25, 2.5, 15.0, 'gpt-5.4-mini', 0.75, 0.075, 0.75, 4.5, 'gpt-5.4-nano', 0.2, 0.02, 0.2, 1.25, 'gpt-5.3-codex', 1.75, 0.175, 1.75, 14.0, 'gpt-5.2-codex', 1.75, 0.175, 1.75, 14.0, 'gpt-5.2', 1.75, 0.175, 1.75, 14.0, 'gpt-5-mini', 0.25, 0.025, 0.25, 2.0, 'gpt-4.1', 2.0, 0.5, 2.0, 8.0, 'gemini-2.5-pro', 1.25, 0.125, 1.25, 10.0, 'gemini-3-flash', 0.5, 0.05, 0.5, 3.0, 'gemini-3.1-pro', 2.0, 0.2, 2.0, 12.0, 'gemini-3.5-flash', 1.5, 0.15, 1.5, 9.0 ]; AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), itok=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']), otok=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']), ctok_read=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.cache_read.input_tokens']), ctok_write=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.cache_creation.input_tokens']) , cost=todouble(Properties['github.copilot.cost']), aiu=todouble(Properties['github.copilot.aiu']) | where operation == 'invoke_agent' | lookup kind=leftouter pricing on model | extend uncached_in = coalesce(itok,0.0) - coalesce(ctok_read,0.0) - coalesce(ctok_write,0.0) | extend uncached_in = iff(uncached_in < 0, 0.0, uncached_in) | extend est_usd = (     uncached_in * coalesce(in_per_m, 5.0)     + coalesce(ctok_read,0.0) * coalesce(cin_per_m, 0.5)     + coalesce(ctok_write,0.0) * coalesce(cw_per_m, 6.25)     + coalesce(otok,0.0) * coalesce(out_per_m, 25.0)   ) / 1000000.0 | summarize Credits=sum(coalesce(cost,0.0)), AIU=sum(coalesce(aiu,0.0)), EstUsd=sum(est_usd) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']) | where operation == 'invoke_agent'  | summarize Runs=count() by model | top 10 by Runs

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']) | where operation == 'execute_tool'  | where isnotempty(tool) | summarize Calls=count() by tool | top 12 by Calls

let rows = AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or Properties has 'agentops.' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['agent.runtime']) in ('codex', 'openai-codex-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), err=tostring(Properties['error.type']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']) | where operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool) | where isnotempty(tool) | summarize Calls=count(), Failures=countif(Success == false or isnotempty(err)) by tool | where Calls >= 3 | extend FailurePct=Failures*100.0/Calls | top 12 by FailurePct; union rows, (print tool='No failing tools observed', Calls=0, Failures=0, FailurePct=real(0) | where toscalar(rows | count) == 0)

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash'])  | where isnotempty(operation) | summarize Count=count() by operation

let rows = AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or Properties has 'agentops.' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['agent.runtime']) in ('codex', 'openai-codex-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), err=tostring(Properties['error.type']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']) | where isnotempty(err) | summarize Count=count() by err | top 10 by Count; union rows, (print err='No errors observed', Count=0 | where toscalar(rows | count) == 0)

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']) | where operation == 'invoke_agent' | where isnotempty(repo) | summarize Runs=count() by repo | top 10 by Runs

let pricing = datatable(model:string, in_per_m:real, cin_per_m:real, cw_per_m:real, out_per_m:real) [ 'claude-opus-4.7-1m-internal', 5.0, 0.5, 6.25, 25.0, 'claude-opus-4.7', 5.0, 0.5, 6.25, 25.0, 'claude-opus-4.6', 5.0, 0.5, 6.25, 25.0, 'claude-opus-4.5', 5.0, 0.5, 6.25, 25.0, 'claude-sonnet-4.6', 3.0, 0.3, 3.75, 15.0, 'claude-sonnet-4.5', 3.0, 0.3, 3.75, 15.0, 'claude-sonnet-4', 3.0, 0.3, 3.75, 15.0, 'claude-haiku-4.5', 1.0, 0.1, 1.25, 5.0, 'gpt-5.5', 5.0, 0.5, 5.0, 30.0, 'gpt-5.4', 2.5, 0.25, 2.5, 15.0, 'gpt-5.4-mini', 0.75, 0.075, 0.75, 4.5, 'gpt-5.4-nano', 0.2, 0.02, 0.2, 1.25, 'gpt-5.3-codex', 1.75, 0.175, 1.75, 14.0, 'gpt-5.2-codex', 1.75, 0.175, 1.75, 14.0, 'gpt-5.2', 1.75, 0.175, 1.75, 14.0, 'gpt-5-mini', 0.25, 0.025, 0.25, 2.0, 'gpt-4.1', 2.0, 0.5, 2.0, 8.0, 'gemini-2.5-pro', 1.25, 0.125, 1.25, 10.0, 'gemini-3-flash', 0.5, 0.05, 0.5, 3.0, 'gemini-3.1-pro', 2.0, 0.2, 2.0, 12.0, 'gemini-3.5-flash', 1.5, 0.15, 1.5, 9.0 ]; AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), conversation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), InputTokens=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']), OutputTokens=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']), CacheRead=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.cache_read.input_tokens']), CacheWrite=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.cache_creation.input_tokens']), Credits=todouble(Properties['github.copilot.cost']), AIU=todouble(Properties['github.copilot.aiu']), turns=toint(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), files_modified=toint(Properties['github.copilot.files_modified_count']) | where operation == 'invoke_agent' | lookup kind=leftouter pricing on model | extend uncached_in = iff(coalesce(InputTokens,0.0) - coalesce(CacheRead,0.0) - coalesce(CacheWrite,0.0) < 0, 0.0, coalesce(InputTokens,0.0) - coalesce(CacheRead,0.0) - coalesce(CacheWrite,0.0)) | extend EstUsd = (uncached_in*coalesce(in_per_m,5.0) + coalesce(CacheRead,0.0)*coalesce(cin_per_m,0.5) + coalesce(CacheWrite,0.0)*coalesce(cw_per_m,6.25) + coalesce(OutputTokens,0.0)*coalesce(out_per_m,25.0))/1000000.0 | project TimeGenerated, agent, model, conversation, repo, InputTokens, CacheRead, CacheWrite, OutputTokens, Credits, EstUsd, AIU, DurationMs, turns, files_modified, Success | top 50 by EstUsd desc nulls last

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), err=tostring(Properties['error.type']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']) | where operation == 'execute_tool'  | summarize calls=count(), failures=countif(Success == false or isnotempty(err)), p95_duration_ms=percentile(DurationMs, 95), top_errors=tostring(make_set(err, 3)) by tool | extend failure_rate=iff(calls==0, real(null), failures*100.0/calls) | project tool, calls, failures, failure_rate, p95_duration_ms, top_errors | order by failures desc, failure_rate desc

let pricing = datatable(model:string, in_per_m:real, cin_per_m:real, cw_per_m:real, out_per_m:real) [ 'claude-opus-4.7-1m-internal', 5.0, 0.5, 6.25, 25.0, 'claude-opus-4.7', 5.0, 0.5, 6.25, 25.0, 'claude-opus-4.6', 5.0, 0.5, 6.25, 25.0, 'claude-opus-4.5', 5.0, 0.5, 6.25, 25.0, 'claude-sonnet-4.6', 3.0, 0.3, 3.75, 15.0, 'claude-sonnet-4.5', 3.0, 0.3, 3.75, 15.0, 'claude-sonnet-4', 3.0, 0.3, 3.75, 15.0, 'claude-haiku-4.5', 1.0, 0.1, 1.25, 5.0, 'gpt-5.5', 5.0, 0.5, 5.0, 30.0, 'gpt-5.4', 2.5, 0.25, 2.5, 15.0, 'gpt-5.4-mini', 0.75, 0.075, 0.75, 4.5, 'gpt-5.4-nano', 0.2, 0.02, 0.2, 1.25, 'gpt-5.3-codex', 1.75, 0.175, 1.75, 14.0, 'gpt-5.2-codex', 1.75, 0.175, 1.75, 14.0, 'gpt-5.2', 1.75, 0.175, 1.75, 14.0, 'gpt-5-mini', 0.25, 0.025, 0.25, 2.0, 'gpt-4.1', 2.0, 0.5, 2.0, 8.0, 'gemini-2.5-pro', 1.25, 0.125, 1.25, 10.0, 'gemini-3-flash', 0.5, 0.05, 0.5, 3.0, 'gemini-3.1-pro', 2.0, 0.2, 2.0, 12.0, 'gemini-3.5-flash', 1.5, 0.15, 1.5, 9.0 ]; AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), itok=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']), otok=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']), ctok_read=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.cache_read.input_tokens']), ctok_write=todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.cache_creation.input_tokens']) , agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), Credits=todouble(Properties['github.copilot.cost']), AIU=todouble(Properties['github.copilot.aiu']) | where operation == 'invoke_agent' | lookup kind=leftouter pricing on model | extend uncached_in = coalesce(itok,0.0) - coalesce(ctok_read,0.0) - coalesce(ctok_write,0.0) | extend uncached_in = iff(uncached_in < 0, 0.0, uncached_in) | extend est_usd = (     uncached_in * coalesce(in_per_m, 5.0)     + coalesce(ctok_read,0.0) * coalesce(cin_per_m, 0.5)     + coalesce(ctok_write,0.0) * coalesce(cw_per_m, 6.25)     + coalesce(otok,0.0) * coalesce(out_per_m, 25.0)   ) / 1000000.0 | summarize Runs=count(), InputTokens=sum(itok), CacheRead=sum(ctok_read), CacheWrite=sum(ctok_write), OutputTokens=sum(otok), Credits=sum(Credits), EstUsd=sum(est_usd), AIU=sum(AIU), P95DurationMs=percentile(DurationMs,95) by model | order by EstUsd desc

union isfuzzy=true AppTraces, AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where Message has 'github.copilot.skill.invoked' or tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot.skill' | extend skill=tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.name']), plugin=coalesce(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.plugin_name']), 'unknown'), plugin_version=coalesce(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.plugin_version']), 'unknown') | where isnotempty(skill) | summarize invocations=count() by skill, plugin, plugin_version | order by invocations desc

let rows = union isfuzzy=true AppTraces, AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where Message has 'github.copilot.hook.error' or tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot.hook.error' | extend hook_type=coalesce(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.type']), 'unknown'), error_message=tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.error_message']) | summarize errors=count(), examples=tostring(make_set(error_message, 5)) by hook_type | order by errors desc; union rows, (print hook_type='No hook errors observed', errors=0, examples='Healthy empty state' | where toscalar(rows | count) == 0)

let rows = union isfuzzy=true AppTraces, AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot.session.truncation' or tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot.session.compaction' or tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot.tokens_removed' | extend pre_tokens=toint(Properties['github.copilot.pre_tokens']), post_tokens=toint(Properties['github.copilot.post_tokens']), tokens_removed=toint(Properties['github.copilot.tokens_removed']), messages_removed=toint(Properties['github.copilot.messages_removed']), performed_by=coalesce(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.performed_by']), 'unknown') | project TimeGenerated, performed_by, pre_tokens, post_tokens, tokens_removed, messages_removed | order by TimeGenerated desc | take 100; union rows, (print TimeGenerated=now(), performed_by='No truncation or compaction observed', pre_tokens=int(null), post_tokens=int(null), tokens_removed=int(0), messages_removed=int(0) | where toscalar(rows | count) == 0)

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), conversation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), err=tostring(Properties['error.type']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash'])  | project TimeGenerated, operation, Name, agent, model, tool, conversation, repo, DurationMs, Success, err | order by TimeGenerated desc | take 100

union isfuzzy=true AppTraces, AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where tostring(Properties) has_any ('github.copilot', 'gen_ai.operation.name', 'agentops.', 'copilot_chat', 'codex') or Message has_any ('github.copilot', 'AgentOps', 'copilot_chat', 'codex') or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') | summarize Signals=countif(tostring(Properties['agentops.content_capture.signal']) =~ 'true' or tostring(Properties) has 'gen_ai.prompt' or tostring(Properties) has 'gen_ai.completion' or tostring(Properties) has 'gen_ai.input.messages' or tostring(Properties) has 'gen_ai.output.messages') by TimeGenerated=bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

union isfuzzy=true AppTraces, AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where tostring(Properties) has_any ('github.copilot', 'gen_ai.operation.name', 'agentops.', 'copilot_chat', 'codex') or Message has_any ('github.copilot', 'AgentOps', 'copilot_chat', 'codex') or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') | summarize Events=countif(tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot.session.truncation' or tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot.session.compaction' or tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot.tokens_removed') by TimeGenerated=bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

union isfuzzy=true AppTraces, AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | summarize Blocks=countif(tostring(Properties) has 'preToolUse' or tostring(Properties) has 'AgentOps preToolUse policy' or Message has 'AgentOps preToolUse policy') by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']) | summarize Repos=dcountif(repo, isnotempty(repo)) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or Properties has 'agentops.' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['agent.runtime']) in ('codex', 'openai-codex-cli')) | where isempty(tostring(Properties['agentops.smoke_id'])) and tostring(Properties['agentops.profile']) !has 'smoke' and isempty(tostring(Properties['agentops.test.kind'])) | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or Properties has 'agentops.' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli', 'codex', 'openai-codex', 'openai-codex-cli') or tostring(Properties['agent.runtime']) in ('codex', 'openai-codex-cli')) | where isempty(tostring(Properties['agentops.smoke_id'])) and tostring(Properties['agentops.profile']) !has 'smoke' and isempty(tostring(Properties['agentops.test.kind'])) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.agent.name']), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name'])), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | project TimeGenerated, Name, operation, agent, tool, Success, error, OperationId | order by TimeGenerated desc | take 50

let rows = union isfuzzy=true AppTraces, AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot.session' or tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot.skill' or tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot.context.skills' or tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot.hook' or tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot.tokens_removed' | extend event=coalesce(tostring(Properties['event.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.event.name']), Name), conversation=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), strcat(iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['service.name'])), tostring(Properties['service.name']), iff(isnotempty(AppRoleName), AppRoleName, 'agent'))), '_', iff(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), iff(isnotempty(OperationId), OperationId, 'session')), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), skill=tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.name']), context_skills=tostring(Properties['github.copilot.context.skills']), hook=tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.name']), tokens_removed=toint(Properties['github.copilot.tokens_removed']), performed_by=tostring(Properties['github.copilot.performed_by']) | project TimeGenerated, event, conversation, skill, context_skills, hook, tokens_removed, performed_by, Message | order by TimeGenerated desc | take 50; union rows, (print TimeGenerated=now(), event='No lifecycle events observed', conversation='', skill='', context_skills='', hook='', tokens_removed=0, performed_by='', Message='' | where toscalar(rows | count) == 0)
